findings.title: RSS lookup rescans /proc for every worker
findings.impact: On hosts with many processes and multiple datasystem workers, each worker RSS lookup walks every /proc entry before opening one status file, making the command O(workers * host_processes) and allocating a fresh directory listing per worker. This can make the operator command noticeably slower on busy production hosts.
findings.fix: Open /proc/<pid>/status directly for the known pid and handle OSError/ProcessLookupError, avoiding os.listdir('/proc') and the per-worker full-process scan.
